subject: Mathematics

lesson.title: RELATIONS AND FUNCTIONS
topics: Relations and functions are important concepts in Mathematics that help us understand how different quantities are
connected. A relation describes a relationship between two sets of values, showing how elements from one set
correspond to elements in another. A function is a special type of relation where each input is linked to exactly one
output. Relations and functions are widely used in areas such as science, economics, engineering, and technology,
